Name: Number of times Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation is performed before SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' occurs

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation by case
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation from all manuscript submission confirmation types (Original, First Look, Revised, Resubmission)
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in cases with a SW-Reviewer Agreed event
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average number of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation per reviewer agreed case
Metric: the average of the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation with a subsequent Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded'

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation that are not followed by Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all cases where 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' does not happen

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation that is the first event in a case
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Ratio of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation over Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation in the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Number of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in relation to SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' occurs

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation followed by Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation out of all SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'

Name: Fraction of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation that are in cases with immediate reject from checklist
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist'

Name: Number of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation with a time to SW-Checklist Completed above the median
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' occurs

Name: Total Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation performed in cases ending in RW-EIC Accept
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'RW-EIC Accept' occurs
